PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\user\\Desktop\\data"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { cd "C:\\Users\\user\\Desktop\\data"; python dashboard_app.py 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep 5; Receive-Job $job; netstat -ano | findstr ":8080")

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\user\\Desktop\\data"; $psi = New-Object System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo; $psi.FileName = "python"; $psi.Arguments = "dashboard_app.py"; $psi.RedirectStandardOutput = $true; $psi.RedirectStandardError = $true; $psi.UseShellExecute = $false; $psi.WorkingDirectory = "C:\\Users\\user\\Desktop\\data"; $p = [System.Diagnostics.Process]::Start\($psi\); Start-Sleep 4; $out = $p.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd\(\); $err = $p.StandardError.ReadToEnd\(\); Write-Host "Running:" \(!$p.HasExited\); Write-Host "OUT:$out"; Write-Host "ERR:$err")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/trade-map" -UseBasicParsing; $data = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Routes:" $data.routes.Count; $data.routes | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_.country $_.amount })
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:8080 -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "OK $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "FAIL: $_" })
